summary:
Perfect! The test has passed. The issue was that the Go application was using the old column name `status` in its SQL queries, but the database migration had renamed this column to `order_status`. I fixed both the INSERT and SELECT queries to use the correct column name `order_status`, and now all tests pass successfully.

The needle in the haystack was the mismatch between the SQL queries in the application code and the actual database schema after migrations were applied.
